description_long: This object is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, featuring a tall, rectangular structure with a slightly angled front face. The front panel includes a large display screen set within a bezel, and a control panel below it equipped with visible buttons and a joystick, designed for interactive gameplay. The cabinet is predominantly black with red trim outlining the front edges, giving it a bold, retro appearance. The base is broad and stable, supporting the weight of the cabinet and providing a platform for players to stand in front of. The top section houses a marquee area, which appears to be blank or unadorned in this instance. The side panels are plain, lacking any decorative artwork or decals commonly found on themed arcade machines.
description: A black upright arcade game cabinet with red trim, a large screen, and a control panel featuring buttons and a joystick. The cabinet has a blank marquee and plain side panels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angled front face, control panel, and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the display screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, and red trim outlining the cabinet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the angled front and control panel.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the plain back of the cabinet with no visible features or access panels.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, flat front, medium size, visible bezel, typical of classic arcade cabinets
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several round buttons arranged in a cluster, no visible markings or color differentiation on controls
